title: sibbaldia cuneata var. micrantha
intro: Sibbaldia cuneata var. micrantha, also known as small-flowered sibbaldia or small-flowered rosy plectritis, is a plant species in the rose family that is native to the mountainous regions of Japan and the surrounding islands. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Sibbaldia cuneata var. micrantha include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
